did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study used high-frequency ultrasound (HFUS) and ultra-high-frequency ultrasound (UHFUS) combined with univariate and multivariate logistic regression analyses to distinguish dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans from dermatofibroma. Artificial intelligence is only mentioned in the 'Future Directions' section as a potential area for future research to enhance diagnostic accuracy, not as a method used in the current study.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
